headline: Action(s) taken or orders passed
summary: Timken India Limited has disclosed that an order was passed by the Gujarat High Court in a case involving Antifriction Bearings Corporation Limited (now merged with Timken) and Anil Ambalal Modi. The disclosure was made under SEBI listing regulations, with further details provided in the attached document.

headline: Press Release
summary: Hubtown Limited issued a press release on June 23, 2026, regarding a scheme of arrangement to merge Saicharan Consultancy Private Limited and 25 West Realty Private Limited with the company. The announcement was submitted to the stock exchange for public disclosure.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Kitex Garments Limited has issued a notice to convene meetings of shareholders and creditors regarding a Scheme of Arrangement with Kitex Childrenswear Limited. The scheme involves both companies and their respective stakeholders. The announcement serves as an update on the procedural steps for the proposed arrangement.

headline: Updates
summary: The National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) Indore Bench has pronounced an order on an application filed by CMM Infraprojects Limited seeking directions to implement its approved resolution plan, specifically regarding the reconstitution of share capital and public shareholding. The resolution plan, submitted by Effulgence Trading and Services Private Limited and Shree Naivedya Fincom Private Limited, was approved by the NCLT on November 11, 2024, following the initiation of Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) against the company in December 2022. The order was delivered on June 18, 2026, by the NCLT bench comprising Member (Judicial) Brajendra Mani Tripathi and Member (Technical) Man Mohan Gupta.

headline: Copy of Newspaper Publication
summary: Concord Enviro Systems Limited has published newspaper advertisements in Business Standard and Navshakti regarding a Scheme of Arrangement with its shareholders. The petition for the scheme has been admitted by the National Company Law Tribunal, Mumbai Bench, and is scheduled for a hearing on 23rd July 2026. The company has informed stakeholders and made the publication copies available on its website.

headline: Copy of Newspaper Publication
summary: Kitex Garments Limited has informed the exchange of a newspaper publication regarding notices for meetings of equity shareholders and unsecured creditors. These meetings are being convened to consider a Scheme of Arrangement between Kitex Childrenswear Ltd and Kitex Garments Ltd, along with their respective shareholders and creditors.

headline: General Updates
summary: Aster DM Healthcare Limited has received the certified copy of the NCLT order approving the amalgamation of Quality Care India Limited into Aster DM. The scheme will become effective once filed with the Registrar of Companies, after which QCIL will be dissolved. The company will announce the effective date to stock exchanges in due course.

headline: Copy of Newspaper Publication
summary: Kansai Nerolac Paints Limited has published a notice in newspapers regarding a hearing for the scheme of amalgamation with Nerofix Private Limited, scheduled before the NCLT Mumbai Bench on July 29, 2026. The announcement was made in compliance with SEBI regulations and appeared in the Free Press Journal (English) and Navshakti (Marathi) on June 24, 2026.

headline: General Updates
summary: Refex Industries Limited has disclosed, under SEBI Listing Regulations, that the Hon'ble NCLT has passed an order regarding the Composite Scheme of Amalgamation and Arrangement. The order pertains to the convening of a meeting to consider the scheme. This update follows regulatory requirements for material corporate actions.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Larsen & Toubro Limited announced that its Transferor Company has received an order from the NCLT, Mumbai Bench, directing it to convene a shareholder meeting within 60 days to seek approval for a proposed Scheme of Arrangement. The company will finalize the meeting date and dispatch notices accordingly. A minor typographical error in the order's date has been noted and is being rectified, without affecting the order's substance.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: BASF India Limited held a virtual shareholders' meeting on June 24, 2026, as ordered by the National Company Law Tribunal, to vote on a Scheme of Arrangement with BASF Agricultural Solutions India Limited. The resolution approving the scheme was passed by the required majority of equity shareholders.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: BASF India Limited held an NCLT-convened equity shareholders meeting on June 24, 2026, to consider and approve a Scheme of Arrangement to demerge its Agricultural Solutions business into a separate listed entity. The demerger, which has already received no-objection letters from SEBI and stock exchanges, will see shareholders receive one share in the new company for every one share held, with completion targeted by March 2027.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited held meetings of its secured creditors, unsecured creditors, and equity shareholders on June 24, 2026, via video conferencing to consider a composite scheme of arrangement involving Apollo Healthco Limited, Keimed Private Limited, and Apollo Healthtech Limited. The meetings, conducted under the direction of the NCLT, were chaired by Dr. K.S. Ravichandran and have concluded, with summaries of proceedings submitted for record. Voting results will be provided separately as per SEBI regulations.

headline: Outcome of Board Meeting
summary: Aster DM Healthcare Limited's Board has taken on record the NCLT's approval of its amalgamation with Quality Care India Limited. The Board has fixed July 9, 2026, as the record date to determine shareholder entitlements for share allotment. Under the scheme, QCIL shareholders will receive 977 Aster DM shares for every 1,000 shares held.

headline: Updates
summary: Neueon Corporation Limited announced that the Hon'ble NCLT approved the reclassification of its erstwhile promoters under the company's resolution plan, as per an order dated October 23, 2024. The update was provided in compliance with Regulation 31A of the SEBI Listing Regulations.

headline: Record Date
summary: Aster DM Healthcare Limited has announced that the record date for determining equity shareholders' entitlement to receive fully paid-up shares of the company (face value INR 10 each) is set as 09-Jul-2026. This record date applies to shareholders of the transferor company, QCIL, for the allotment of Aster DM shares.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Magellanic Cloud Limited’s board approved a scheme to amalgamate its wholly-owned subsidiary, IVIS International Private Limited, with itself, effective April 1, 2026, with no new shares to be issued. The board also approved raising capital via preferential allotment of equity shares and convertible warrants, increasing the NRI investment ceiling to 24%, and providing up to ₹150 crore in loans or guarantees to three subsidiaries. These proposals are subject to shareholder approval at an Extraordinary General Meeting on July 24, 2026, and other regulatory clearances.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Astral Limited's board has approved a composite scheme to demerge its chemicals business into its wholly-owned subsidiary, Astral Chemie Limited, and amalgamate Al-Aziz Plastics Private Limited into Astral Limited. The chemicals business, which contributed 21% of Astral's total turnover (₹12,663 million) in the last fiscal year, will be transferred on a going concern basis. The scheme is subject to approvals from the NCLT, SEBI, stock exchanges, and other regulatory authorities.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: RPSG Ventures Limited has approved the acquisition of Clarionix Healthcare Private Limited, making it a wholly-owned subsidiary to explore new opportunities in the medical sector. The board also approved a composite scheme of arrangement involving the amalgamation of Woodlands Multispeciality Hospital Limited with RPSG Ventures and the transfer of its hospital and nursing business to Clarionix on a slump sale basis. The scheme is subject to approvals from the NCLT, stock exchanges, SEBI, and shareholders.

headline: Outcome of Board Meeting
summary: RPSG Ventures Limited's Board approved the acquisition of 100% equity in Clarionix Healthcare Private Limited, making it a wholly-owned subsidiary effective June 25, 2026. The Board also approved a composite scheme of arrangement involving the amalgamation of Woodlands Multispeciality Hospital Limited with RPSG Ventures and the transfer of its hospital business to Clarionix via a slump sale. The scheme is subject to approvals from the NCLT, stock exchanges, SEBI, and shareholders.

headline: General Updates
summary: Gujarat Gas Limited has informed the stock exchange about an email sent to shareholders regarding Record Date 3 under its Scheme of Arrangement. The communication provides updates on the record date for the arrangement. This announcement serves as a general update to keep shareholders informed.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Krebs Biochemicals and Industries Limited has approved a Scheme of Amalgamation with Ipca Laboratories Limited, effective from April 1, 2026, subject to regulatory approvals. The merger aims to create operational synergies, consolidate pharmaceutical manufacturing capabilities—particularly for fermentation-based APIs—and secure the supply of a key therapeutic ingredient for Ipca’s largest-selling formulation. The transaction is classified as a related party transaction conducted at arm’s length.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary:
Here is a summary of the corporate announcement in 2-3 concise sentences:

Ipca Laboratories Limited's Board has approved a Scheme of Amalgamation to merge Krebs Biochemicals & Industries Ltd. into Ipca, with an appointed date of April 1, 2026. The merger aims to create operational synergies, secure the supply of key fermentation-based APIs and drug intermediates, and leverage Ipca's financial strength to develop new products. The scheme is subject to necessary regulatory approvals and is classified as a related-party transaction conducted at arm's length.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited announced that its composite scheme of arrangement with Apollo Healthco, Keimed Private, and Apollo Healthtech has been approved by its equity shareholders, secured creditors, and unsecured creditors with the requisite majority. The resolutions were passed at meetings held on June 24, 2026, and the voting results along with the Scrutinizer's Reports have been filed and made available on the company's website.

headline: Outcome of Board Meeting
summary: Apollo Pipes Limited's board has approved a two-step Scheme of Arrangement to amalgamate its wholly-owned subsidiary, KML Tradelinks Private Limited, into Kisan Mouldings Limited (KML), and then merge KML into Apollo Pipes. The scheme, effective from April 1, 2026, involves the cancellation of certain shares and the issuance of new Apollo Pipes shares to KML shareholders based on a recommended exchange ratio. The amalgamation is subject to approvals from shareholders, creditors, stock exchanges, SEBI, and the National Company Law Tribunal.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Apollo Pipes Limited has approved a two-step Scheme of Arrangement to amalgamate its wholly-owned subsidiary, KML Tradelinks Private Limited, into Kisan Mouldings Limited (KML), followed by the amalgamation of KML into Apollo Pipes. The scheme, effective from April 1, 2026, involves the cancellation of intercompany shareholdings and the issuance of Apollo Pipes shares to KML’s shareholders based on a prescribed exchange ratio. The merger is subject to approvals from shareholders, creditors, stock exchanges, SEBI, and the National Company Law Tribunal.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Digjam Limited announced that the National Company Law Tribunal, Chennai Bench, has issued an order regarding the proposed Scheme of Arrangement between Reid & Taylor International Private Limited (demerged company) and Digjam Limited (resulting company). The scheme involves the amalgamation or merger of the two entities.

headline: General Updates
summary: Digjam Limited has informed the Exchange of an order from the National Company Law Tribunal, Chennai Bench, regarding the proposed Scheme of Arrangement between Reid & Taylor International Private Limited (Demerged Company) and Digjam Limited (Resulting Company) and its shareholders. The announcement provides a general update on the tribunal's proceedings related to this scheme.

headline: Press Release
summary: Pricol Limited's Board has approved a scheme to demerge its Driver Information & Connected Vehicle Solutions (DICVS) business into a new entity, Pricol Autotech Limited. The DICVS business, which generated 61.17% of Pricol's consolidated turnover in the last financial year, will be transferred to allow each company to focus on its respective operations. The scheme is subject to approvals from stock exchanges, the National Company Law Tribunal, and shareholders.

headline: Demerger
summary: Pricol Limited's board has approved a scheme to demerge its Driver Information & Connected Vehicle Solutions (DICVS) business into a new entity, Pricol Autotech Limited. The DICVS business, which generated 61.17% of Pricol's consolidated turnover (₹2,424.63 crore) in the last financial year, will be transferred to allow each company to focus on its respective operations. The demerger is subject to approvals from stock exchanges, the National Company Law Tribunal, shareholders, and creditors.

headline: Press Release
summary: VMS TMT Limited issued a press release to comply with applicable legal requirements. For additional details, stakeholders can contact Corporate Communication Advisor Ms. Pooja Gandhi at EquiBridgex Advisors Private Limited via email or website.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Power Finance Corporation Limited (PFC) has approved a scheme to merge REC Limited into itself, with REC shareholders receiving 88 PFC shares for every 100 REC shares. The merger will dissolve REC without winding up, subject to necessary regulatory approvals.

headline: General Updates
summary: Marico Limited has completed the integration of its wholly owned subsidiary, Zed Lifestyle Private Limited, by distributing Zed's business undertaking to Marico on a going concern basis, effective June 29, 2026. The liquidator will now seek NCLT approval for Zed's dissolution. This follows prior disclosures about the intra-group restructuring.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Arihant Capital Markets Limited (ACML) has received "no adverse observations" from BSE and "no objection" from NSE regarding its composite Scheme of Arrangement involving multiple group entities. The scheme remains subject to other regulatory approvals, and the observation letters have been uploaded to the company's website.

headline: Updates
summary: Following the NCLT's June 12, 2026 order, Master Components Limited has scheduled a meeting of its Unsecured Creditors for August 3, 2026, at 4:00 PM via video conferencing to consider and vote on a proposed Scheme. The company has issued a formal notice for the meeting, with remote e-voting available from July 31 to August 3, 2026, and has made the relevant documents accessible on its website and through NSDL.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Autoline Industries Limited has approved a scheme to amalgamate its subsidiary, Autoline Design Software Limited, into itself. Following feedback from statutory auditors, the company amended Clause 7 of the scheme to align accounting treatment with Ind AS 103 for common control business combinations. The amendments are purely accounting-related and do not alter the commercial terms, valuation, or structure of the merger.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: MM Forgings Limited announced that the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Chennai Bench, has approved the scheme of amalgamation of its wholly owned subsidiary, DVS Industries Private Limited, with the company. The order was pronounced on June 19, 2026, and uploaded on the NCLT website on June 29, 2026. The scheme will take effect once certified copies are filed with the Registrar of Companies, after which the subsidiary will be dissolved.

headline: Agreements
summary: Rane (Madras) Limited has entered into a Business Transfer Agreement with Hindustan Composites Limited to acquire its friction business on a slump sale basis. The acquisition was approved by the Board of Directors and is subject to customary closing conditions.

headline: Acquisition
summary: Rane (Madras) Limited has entered into a Business Transfer Agreement with Hindustan Composites Limited to acquire its friction business on a slump sale basis. The acquisition, approved by the Board, is structured as a going concern transfer and is subject to customary closing conditions.

headline: Outcome of Board Meeting
summary: NDL Ventures Limited announced the outcome of its Board Meeting held on June 30, 2026, providing an update on the proposed scheme of merger by absorption of Hinduja Leyland Finance Limited into NDL Ventures Limited. The board discussed further developments regarding the merger process. No specific resolution or final decision was detailed in the announcement.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Future Market Networks Limited has informed the stock exchange that the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) has formally disposed of the company's application to withdraw its proposed amalgamation with Metawear Limited. The withdrawal was approved based on board resolutions passed by both companies in May 2026. Consequently, the merger scheme has been abandoned.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: NIIT Limited announced that, following board approvals and compliance with the Companies Act, 2013, the scheme of amalgamation involving three companies became effective on July 1, 2026. The required Form INC-28 has been filed with the Registrar of Companies, Haryana.

headline: Updates
summary: Maithan Alloys Limited announced that the certified order from the NCLT sanctioning its scheme of arrangement became available on June 30, 2026, with the scheme operative from March 31, 2024, and effective from June 30, 2025. Under the scheme, all assets and liabilities of Impex Metal & Ferro Alloys Limited have been transferred to Maithan Alloys, and Impex Metal & Ferro Alloys Limited was dissolved effective June 30, 2026.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Divine Power Energy Limited has received a "No Objection" letter from the National Stock Exchange (NSE) regarding its proposed merger with Viraj Upkram Private Limited. The NSE's observation letter allows the company to file the scheme with the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), subject to compliance with specific conditions, including disclosing ongoing legal proceedings and ensuring all liabilities are transferred. The company has committed to fulfilling all stipulated requirements while pursuing the scheme's approval and implementation.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Arihant Capital Markets Limited (ACML) announced that it has received "no adverse observations" from BSE and "no objection" from NSE regarding its Composite Scheme of Arrangement. The scheme involves multiple entities and remains subject to other regulatory approvals. The observation letters have been uploaded on the company's website for stakeholder reference.

headline: General Updates
summary: Aster DM Healthcare Limited has announced the effective date of its Scheme of Amalgamation, along with a change in promoter category. The company has also amended its Memorandum and Articles of Association (MoA & AOA) in accordance with the scheme. These updates have been formally communicated to the stock exchange.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Beacon Trusteeship Limited has filed a petition with the NCLT Mumbai for a scheme of amalgamation involving itself and three transferor companies: Beacon Payroll & Benefits, Codium Techlabs, and Kratos Capital Advisors. The tribunal heard the matter on June 22, 2026, and has scheduled the next hearing for August 12, 2026.

headline: General Updates
summary: Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Limited has published a newspaper notice regarding the hearing of a petition related to its proposed merger with Utkarsh CoreInvest Limited. The announcement informs the exchange of this regulatory update.

headline: Press Release
summary: Aster DM Healthcare Limited announced the successful completion of its merger with Quality Care India Limited. The update was communicated to the exchange via a press release dated July 2, 2026.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Lenskart Solutions Limited announced the approval of a scheme to amalgamate its two wholly-owned subsidiaries, Dealskart Online Services Private Limited and Lenskart Eyetech Private Limited, into itself. The merger involves the consolidation of the subsidiaries' shareholders and creditors into the parent company.

headline: General Updates
summary: HEG Limited announced that the Hon'ble NCLT, Indore Bench, has reserved its order on the company's scheme petition during a hearing on July 2, 2026. The company will inform the stock exchanges once the order is pronounced and uploaded on the NCLT website.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: BASF India Limited held a shareholders meeting to discuss a demerger scheme, where Managing Director Alexander Gerding highlighted the company's commitment to sustainable agriculture and farmer safety. The company reported strong business performance with agricultural solutions sales of INR 1,944 crores and a profit before tax of INR 254 crores in 2025-2026, driven by 12 new product launches since 2022. Shareholders were informed that inspection documents are available electronically upon request to the Company Secretary.

company: Aditya Birla Fashion and Retail Limited
headline: General Updates
summary: Aditya Birla Fashion and Retail Limited (ABFRL) announced that the National Company Law Tribunal, Mumbai Bench, has pronounced an order approving the Scheme of Amalgamation involving Jaypore E-Commerce Private Limited, TG Apparel & Decor Private Limited, and ABFRL. The scheme pertains to the merger of these entities with ABFRL, impacting their respective shareholders and creditors.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: GSP Crop Science Limited's board approved a scheme to merge its wholly-owned subsidiaries, Rajdhani Petrochemicals Private Limited and GSP Intermediates Private Limited, into itself, effective April 1, 2026. Under the scheme, all assets and liabilities of the subsidiaries will be transferred at carrying value, and no new shares will be issued since GSP already holds all their equity. The transaction is a related-party deal but is exempt from certain compliance requirements under company and SEBI regulations.

headline: Outcome of Board Meeting
summary: GSP Crop Science Limited's board has approved a scheme of arrangement to merge its wholly-owned subsidiaries, Rajdhani Petrochemicals Private Limited and GSP Intermediates Private Limited, into itself, effective April 1, 2026. Under the scheme, all assets and liabilities of the subsidiaries will be transferred at carrying value, with no new shares issued since GSP already holds their entire share capital. The transaction is a related-party deal but is exempt from certain compliance requirements under SEBI and company law regulations.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: Dr. Agarwal's Health Care Limited held a shareholder meeting on July 2, 2026, convened by the NCLT to approve a Scheme of Amalgamation with Dr. Agarwal's Eye Hospital Limited. The meeting, chaired by Shri L N Gupta, had 47 shareholders present and achieved the required quorum. The resolution to approve the amalgamation scheme was duly transacted by the equity shareholders.

headline: General Updates
summary: Dr. Agarwal's Health Care Limited announced that the meeting of its unsecured creditors, convened by the NCLT, was held on July 2, 2026, to vote on a proposed Scheme. The resolutions for the Scheme were approved by the requisite majority of creditors, as confirmed by the appointed Scrutinizer. The company has made the detailed results available on its website.

headline: General Updates
summary: Dr. Agarwal's Health Care Limited held a meeting of its unsecured creditors on July 2, 2026, as directed by the NCLT, to consider a scheme of amalgamation with Dr. Agarwal's Eye Hospital Limited. However, the meeting was adjourned because the required quorum of at least 30 unsecured creditors was not present. The resolutions related to the scheme were therefore not transacted.

headline: General Updates
summary: Dr. Agarwal's Health Care Limited announced that the secured creditors' meeting, convened by the NCLT on July 2, 2026, has approved the proposed Scheme with the requisite majority. The voting was conducted through remote e-voting and in-person polls, with Shri Shivam Parashar serving as the Scrutinizer. The resolutions are deemed passed as of the meeting date.

headline: General Updates
summary: Dr. Agarwal's Health Care Limited held a meeting of its secured creditors on July 2, 2026, as directed by the NCLT, to consider a scheme of amalgamation with Dr. Agarwal's Eye Hospital Limited. With the required quorum of one secured creditor present, the resolutions related to the scheme were duly transacted and approved. The company has submitted a summary of the proceedings to the stock exchanges in compliance with SEBI regulations.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: Balkrishna Paper Mills Limited announced that shareholders approved a scheme for reduction of share capital and several material related party transactions via remote e-voting, with results declared on July 2, 2026. The voting period ran from June 3 to July 2, 2026, and was scrutinized by a practicing company secretary. The company has submitted the voting results and scrutinizer’s report as per SEBI regulations.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: The National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) Mumbai has approved a scheme of amalgamation on July 2, 2026, merging three entities—Amba River Coke Limited, Monnet Cement Limited, and JSW Retail and Distribution Limited—into JSW Steel Limited. The scheme will become effective once the certified NCLT order is filed with the Registrar of Companies, and JSW Steel will inform stock exchanges of the effective date.

headline: Press Release
summary: Allcargo Global Limited announced that it has commenced trading on the NSE and BSE following its demerger from Allcargo Logistics Limited. The company submitted a press release dated July 3, 2026, to the stock exchange regarding this development.

headline: General Updates
summary: India Glycols Limited has informed the exchanges that the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Allahabad Bench, has reserved its order on the company’s proposed demerger scheme involving Ennature Bio pharma Limited and IGL Spirits Limited. The NCLT heard arguments regarding an outstanding income tax demand of ₹27,890, with the company asserting the amount was already paid in 2023 and providing an undertaking to address any post-sanction demands. The final pronouncement on the scheme is now pending.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Belrise Industries Limited has received "no adverse observations" from both NSE and BSE regarding its proposed scheme of amalgamation. The scheme involves the merger by absorption of Badve Autocomps Private Limited and Eximius Infra Tech Solutions Private Limited into Belrise Industries Limited. This clearance, issued under Regulation 37 of the Listing Regulations, marks a key regulatory step in the consolidation process.

headline: Copy of Newspaper Publication
summary: Salasar Techno Engineering Limited has informed the exchange of a newspaper publication announcing a fresh (de novo) meeting of equity shareholders, to be held under NCLT supervision. The notice details the convening of this shareholder meeting as directed by the tribunal.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: Salasar Techno Engineering Limited has been directed by the NCLT, Allahabad Bench, to hold a fresh (de novo) meeting of its equity shareholders on August 8, 2026, to consider and approve a Scheme of Amalgamation with Hill View Infrabuild Limited. This meeting supersedes the earlier one held on June 5, 2026, and will be conducted via video conferencing. Remote e-voting will be open from August 4 to August 7, 2026, with voting eligibility based on the shareholding record as of August 1, 2026.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Piramal Finance Limited has filed a company petition with the NCLT Mumbai Bench on July 4, 2026, seeking approval for a proposed amalgamation/merger scheme. The petition was submitted jointly with the transferor companies involved in the scheme.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Astral Limited’s Board has decided to conduct an independent review of its Composite Scheme of Arrangement following stakeholder feedback. The Board approved appointing a big four firm as an external advisor to evaluate the scheme and provide recommendations within 30 days. A final decision on the scheme’s continuation or modification will be made after considering the advisor’s findings.

headline: Outcome of Board Meeting
summary: Astral Limited’s Board has decided to conduct a comprehensive independent review of its Composite Scheme of Arrangement following stakeholder feedback. The Board approved the appointment of a big four or equivalent firm as an external advisor, which will submit recommendations within 30 days. A final decision on the scheme will be made only after considering the advisor’s findings.

headline: Copy of Newspaper Publication
summary: Refex Industries Limited has published a newspaper notice regarding meetings of its equity shareholders and creditors, as well as creditors of Refex Green Mobility Limited, as directed by the NCLT Chennai Bench. The meetings are being convened under SEBI regulations to consider a proposed scheme involving the transferor and transferee companies.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: GANESH HOUSING LIMITED announced it has received observation letters from BSE and NSE regarding its Scheme of Arrangement with Gatil Properties Private Limited. The letters include SEBI comments requiring disclosures on ongoing adjudication, compliance with circulars, and updated financials. The scheme remains subject to further regulatory approvals.

headline: General Updates
summary: Ceigall India Limited announced that July 6, 2026, has been declared the Appointed Date for its subsidiary’s Indore-Ujjain Greenfield Highway project, which has a project cost of Rs. 1,089 crore and will be executed under the Hybrid Annuity Mode (HAM). The 48.10 km, four-lane highway project is being developed by Madhya Pradesh Road Development Corporation Ltd.

headline: General Updates
summary: Ceigall India Limited announced that NHAI has declared July 6, 2026, as the Appointed Date for its subsidiary’s 6-lane highway project under the Bharatmala Pariyojana in Jharkhand. The project, valued at ₹1,305 crore, will be executed on a Hybrid Annuity Mode (HAM) basis. This update pertains to an ongoing project previously disclosed in the company’s Red Herring Prospectus.

headline: General Updates
summary: Ceigall India Limited announced that NHAI has declared July 6, 2026, as the Appointed Date for its subsidiary’s project to construct a 6-lane expressway in Jharkhand under the Hybrid Annuity Mode. The project, valued at ₹1,656 crore, involves building a 36.9 km stretch from Donoreshan village to Bongabar village as part of the Bharatmala Pariyojana. This update confirms the formal commencement timeline for the ongoing HAM project previously detailed in the company’s Red Herring Prospectus.

headline: Demerger
summary: Religare Enterprises Limited (REL) has received a no-objection observation letter from the NSE and no adverse observations from the BSE regarding its proposed demerger scheme. The scheme involves the demerger of REL into Religare Finvest Limited (RFL), covering the arrangement between the companies, their shareholders, and creditors. This clearance marks a key regulatory step toward the completion of the corporate restructuring.

headline: News Verification
summary: Ola Electric Mobility Limited has been asked by the stock exchange to clarify a news report about two suppliers moving the NCLT over unpaid dues, which caused a 5% drop in its share price. The company has not yet responded to the exchange's request for clarification.

headline: Press Release
summary: Ceigall India Limited announced it has received appointed dates for three Hybrid Annuity Model (HAM) projects valued at ₹4,050 crore, strengthening its infrastructure portfolio. The details were shared via a press release dated July 7, 2026.

headline: Record Date
summary: JB Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals has fixed Friday, 17th July 2026, as the Record Date to determine shareholders eligible to receive Torrent Pharma shares under the approved amalgamation scheme. Eligible shareholders will receive 51 fully paid-up equity shares of Torrent Pharma (face value Rs. 5 each) for every 100 shares held in JB Chemicals (face value Re. 1 each). This follows the sanction of the scheme by the NCLT, Ahmedabad Bench on 6th July 2026.

headline: Updates
summary: Nazara Technologies has received NCLT approval to withdraw the proposed merger of its subsidiary, Paper Boat Apps Private Limited, into itself. The withdrawal follows a change in the company's restructuring plans, as previously disclosed in May 2026. The tribunal has formally dismissed the scheme application.

headline: News Verification
summary: Ola Electric Mobility Limited has responded to a stock exchange clarification request regarding a news report that its shares fell 5% after two suppliers reportedly moved the NCLT over unpaid dues. The company’s official reply to the exchange is now attached for reference.

headline: Other Restructuring
summary: Reliance Industries announced that its step-down subsidiary, REC US Holdings, Inc., has been dissolved effective July 6, 2026, and is no longer a subsidiary. The company was non-operating with nil turnover in 2025 and had a negligible net worth of Rs. 0.0009 crore, representing 0.0000001% of Reliance’s consolidated net worth.

headline: General Updates
summary: Kalpataru Limited announced a Scheme of Arrangement to merge its step-down wholly-owned subsidiary, Kalpataru Hills Residency Private Limited, into its wholly-owned subsidiary, Kalpataru Properties (Thane) Limited. The merger by absorption involves the companies and their respective shareholders. This update was communicated to the stock exchange as a general corporate disclosure.

headline: General Updates
summary: Gujarat Energy Limited announced that GSPL Transmission Limited (GTL) has allotted 31,27,43,617 equity shares to its eligible shareholders as of the July 2, 2026 record date, under a composite scheme of amalgamation. GTL will apply for listing these shares on NSE and BSE, and they will remain frozen in the depository system until trading permissions are granted.

headline: Demerger
summary: Kalpataru Limited has received approval from the NCLT Mumbai Bench to withdraw its proposed scheme of arrangement for demerging an undertaking from its step-down subsidiary, Kalpataru Properties Limited, into the company. The tribunal's order effectively halts the previously planned restructuring.

headline: General Updates
summary: Sundrop Brands Limited announced that the boards of its material wholly-owned subsidiary, Del Monte Foods Private Limited (DMF), and its step-down subsidiary, Del Monte Foods India (North) Private Limited (DMFN), have approved a Scheme of Amalgamation to merge DMFN into DMF under the fast-track route. The merger aims to streamline business operations, and since both entities are wholly-owned subsidiaries, the transaction does not fall under related party provisions. The scheme is subject to necessary regulatory and statutory approvals.

headline: Updates
summary: Godrej Properties Limited announced that the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai, has sanctioned the Scheme of Amalgamation of Embellish Houses Private Limited with Godrej Properties Limited on July 8, 2026. The scheme will become effective once the certified order is received and filed with the Registrar of Companies, Mumbai. The company will inform the stock exchanges of the effective date once finalized.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: The National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai, has approved the Scheme of Amalgamation of Embellish Houses Private Limited (Transferor Company) with Godrej Properties Limited (Transferee Company). The scheme will become effective once the certified NCLT order is filed with the Registrar of Companies, and the company will inform the stock exchanges of the effective date. No objections were raised against the scheme, and the companies have complied with all statutory requirements.

company: Jubilant Agri and Consumer Products Limited
headline: Demerger
summary: Jubilant Agri and Consumer Products Limited has filed a first motion application with the NCLT Allahabad Bench regarding its demerger. The application includes audited financials for the demerged company for FY2025 and provisional financials for the applicant companies, along with a share entitlement report dated November 1, 2025.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: MM Forgings Limited has received the certified order approving the amalgamation of its wholly owned subsidiary, DVS Industries Private Limited, into itself. The company has also been informed of the effective date of this merger. This consolidation integrates the subsidiary fully into the parent entity.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Gujarat Fluorochemicals Limited has received no-objection letters from BSE and NSE regarding a composite scheme of arrangement involving Inox Leasing and Finance Limited, Inox Holdings and Investments Limited, and Gujarat Fluorochemicals Limited. The scheme outlines the demerger and transfer of entities among the involved companies and their shareholders.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Ugro Capital Limited has received observation letters from NSE and BSE regarding its proposed scheme of amalgamation with Profectus Capital Private Limited, following SEBI's comments and no-objection from the RBI. The scheme remains subject to approvals from shareholders, creditors, and the National Company Law Tribunal. The company will continue to update the stock exchanges on further developments.

company: Aditya Birla Fashion and Retail Limited
headline: General Updates
summary: Aditya Birla Fashion and Retail Limited has informed the exchange that it has received a certified copy of the NCLT order approving the scheme of amalgamation involving Jaypore E-Commerce Private Limited and TG Apparel & Decor Private Limited. The order pertains to the merger of these entities with Aditya Birla Fashion and Retail Limited, along with their respective shareholders and creditors.

headline: Record Date
summary: Orchid Pharma Limited announced that the scheme of amalgamation with Dhanuka Laboratories Limited (DLL) has become effective as of July 10, 2026, resulting in DLL's dissolution. The company has fixed Thursday, July 23, 2026, as the record date to determine DLL shareholders eligible to receive Orchid Pharma shares at a ratio of 161 Orchid shares for every 5 DLL shares held. Additionally, the authorized share capital has been increased to ₹164.51 crore following the amalgamation.

headline: Outcome of Board Meeting
summary: Orchid Pharma Limited announced that its Board of Directors has approved the effectiveness of a scheme of amalgamation, resulting in the dissolution of Dhanuka Laboratories Limited (DLL) effective July 10, 2026. Consequently, the company's authorized share capital has increased to ₹164.51 crore, and a record date of July 23, 2026, has been set for issuing shares to DLL shareholders at a ratio of 161 Orchid shares for every 5 DLL shares.

headline: Updates
summary: Orchid Pharma Limited has provided an update on the Scheme of Amalgamation involving Dhanuka Laboratories Limited merging into Orchid Pharma. The announcement, made under SEBI Listing Regulations, addresses the merger process and its impact on shareholders and creditors. No further specific details or outcomes were disclosed in the update.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Kitex Garments Limited has issued an addendum to the notice of meeting for equity shareholders regarding the Scheme of Arrangement with Kitex Childrenswear Limited. The update pertains to the proposed restructuring involving the companies, their shareholders, and creditors. The announcement serves to inform the exchange of this procedural development.

headline: Updates
summary: Triveni Engineering & Industries Limited has fixed Wednesday, July 22, 2026, as the Record Date for the demerger under the approved Scheme. This intimation has been provided to the exchange in compliance with Regulations 30 and 42 of the SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Triveni Engineering & Industries Limited has fixed Wednesday, July 22, 2026, as the Demerger Record Date under its Scheme of Arrangement. The company informed the stock exchange of this date in compliance with SEBI regulations. This record date will determine shareholder eligibility for the demerger.

headline: Updates
summary: Somany Ceramics Limited has informed the stock exchange that it submitted the Chairperson's Reports from the NCLT Kolkata Bench-convened meetings of its equity shareholders and unsecured creditors. These reports detail the outcomes of the respective meetings held as part of a corporate process.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: TVS Supply Chain Solutions Limited has received approval from the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Chennai Bench, for the amalgamation of five companies—Mahogany Logistics Services, TVS SCS Global Freight Solutions, White Data Systems India, SPC International (India), and FLEXOL Packaging (India)—into itself. The scheme is effective from April 1, 2023, but is still subject to final sanction from the NCLT Bengaluru Bench for SPC International and filing of certified orders with the Registrar of Companies. The company will update stock exchanges once all approvals are secured and the scheme becomes fully effective.

headline: General Updates
summary: Authum Investment & Infrastructure Limited announced that the NCLT has rejected its resolution plan for Vas Infrastructure Limited, for which it had been selected as the successful resolution applicant. The company clarified that this rejection has no impact on its business operations. Further developments will be disclosed as per SEBI regulations.

headline: General Updates
summary: Aster DM Healthcare Limited (now Aster DM Quality Care Limited) has allotted 353,551,410 fully paid-up equity shares to eligible shareholders of the transferor company, based on a share exchange ratio of 977 shares for every 1,000 held. This allotment, approved by the board on July 13, 2026, follows the NCLT’s approval of the scheme and increases the company’s paid-up equity capital to INR 8,716,724,390. The newly issued shares rank equally with existing shares and will be listed on BSE and NSE.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Somany Ceramics Limited's Board approved an additional investment of up to ₹15 crore in its subsidiary, Sudha Somany Ceramics Private Limited, through equity and/or preference shares. The investment may be made in one or more tranches.

headline: Updates
summary: Sammaan Capital Limited announced that the NCLT has allowed its clarification application regarding the proposed Scheme of Arrangement, as per the order dated July 10, 2026. This follows the earlier order from June 12, 2026, which had approved the first motion. The clarification order is now available on the company’s website.

headline: Suspension of Trading
summary: Trading in JB Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Limited's equity shares will be suspended from July 17, 2026, due to a Scheme of Amalgamation. The suspension will take effect after the close of trading on July 16, 2026.

headline: Press Release
summary: Route Mobile Limited, through its subsidiary Route Connect Private Limited, has signed a Business Transfer Agreement to acquire Heltar Technologies Private Limited's AI-driven omnichannel customer engagement business. The announcement was made via a press release dated July 13, 2026.

headline: Record Date
summary: Triveni Engineering & Industries Limited has announced that July 22, 2026, is the record date for shareholders to receive equity shares of TPTL as part of the demerger of its power transmission business. Under the scheme, shareholders will receive one TPTL share (face value INR 2) for every three Triveni shares (face value INR 1) they hold.

headline: Other Restructuring
summary: KPIT Technologies has announced the voluntary liquidation and dissolution of Somit Solutions Inc., a wholly owned step-down subsidiary of the company. The process is being carried out through its UK-based subsidiary, KPIT Technologies (UK) Limited. This restructuring move involves the winding up of the step-down entity.

headline: Outcome of Board Meeting
summary: NBCC (India) Limited's Board has approved a Scheme of Arrangement to merge its wholly owned subsidiary, HSCC (India) Limited, with itself on a going concern basis. The decision was made during a board meeting on July 14, 2026, under the relevant sections of the Companies Act and SEBI regulations.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: Digjam Limited has called a meeting of its equity shareholders on August 16, 2026, as directed by the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Chennai Bench. The notice for the meeting has been issued in compliance with the Tribunal's orders.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Amber Enterprises India Limited has received an order from the NCLT Chandigarh Bench approving a scheme of amalgamation/merger. The order was issued on July 3, 2026, and received by the company on July 15, 2026. The details of the scheme are attached to the disclosure.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Spandana Sphoorty Financial Limited announced that its subsidiary, Criss Financial Limited (CFL), has become a wholly owned subsidiary after the company acquired the remaining shares from non-promoter shareholders. As a result, the management will re-evaluate and modify the terms of the proposed merger by absorption scheme, which will then be reconsidered by the Board. The final draft scheme and related documents remain subject to further Board approval.

headline: Record Date
summary: Winsome Yarns Limited has announced that the record date for the reduction, cancellation, and extinguishment of its existing paid-up share capital, as per the NCLT order, is set for July 31, 2026. This action will adjust the company's share capital structure accordingly.

headline: Other Restructuring
summary: WeWork India's Board approved its Q2 FY26 financial results and proposed several restructuring measures, including altering its Memorandum of Association to explicitly allow e-commerce and digital commerce activities. The Board also approved reclassifying its authorized share capital to eliminate preference shares and proposed reducing its Securities Premium Account to offset accumulated losses. These changes are subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals.

headline: Copy of Newspaper Publication
summary: Digjam Limited submitted copies of a joint newspaper advertisement to the stock exchange, published as per an order from the Hon'ble NCLT. The advertisement convenes meetings for the equity shareholders of Digjam Limited and the unsecured creditors of Reid & Taylor International Private Limited. This filing fulfills the regulatory disclosure requirement following the tribunal's directive.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Ugro Capital Limited and Profectus Capital Private Limited have filed a company application with the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) for a Scheme of Arrangement. The scheme is subject to approvals from shareholders, creditors, the NCLT, and other regulatory bodies. The company will update stock exchanges on further developments.

headline: Updates
summary: MPS Limited has received the First Motion Order from the NCLT Chennai Bench regarding the scheme to amalgamate ADI BPO Services Limited with MPS Limited. This order marks a procedural step in the merger process between the two companies.

headline: Updates
summary: India Glycols Limited has announced that the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Allahabad Bench, has sanctioned its Scheme of Arrangement on July 17, 2026. The scheme involves the demerger of the Bio Pharma Undertaking into Ennature Bio Pharma Limited and the Spirits and Biofuel Undertaking into IGL Spirits Limited. A copy of the NCLT order will be submitted once it is uploaded on the tribunal’s website.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: NIIT Learning Systems Limited announced that its subsidiary, NIIT (USA) Inc., received board approval on July 17, 2026, to merge Stackroute Learning Inc. into NIIT USA. The merger was approved by NIIT USA's Board of Directors on the same date.

headline: Copy of Newspaper Publication
summary: Asian Energy Services Limited has informed the exchange of a newspaper publication regarding a hearing for its scheme petition on August 7, 2026. The hearing, directed by the NCLT Mumbai Bench, concerns the proposed merger by absorption of Oilmax Energy Private Limited into Asian Energy Services Limited.

headline: Updates
summary: NBCC (India) Limited has informed the stock exchange about a Scheme of Arrangement to merge HSCC (India) Limited with NBCC, involving shareholders and creditors. The disclosure is made under Regulation 37(6) of SEBI's listing regulations.

headline: Updates
summary: MPS Limited has received the First Motion Order from the NCLT Chennai Bench regarding the Scheme of Amalgamation of ADI BPO Services Limited into MPS Limited. This order marks a procedural step in the legal process for the merger. The announcement updates the exchange on the progress of the amalgamation.

headline: General Updates
summary: Torrent Pharmaceuticals has allotted 41,922,416 fully paid-up equity shares to eligible shareholders of J. B. Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals, based on the record date of July 17, 2026. This allotment was made as part of the approved scheme of amalgamation between the two companies.

headline: Updates
summary: India Glycols Limited has provided an update to the exchange regarding its Scheme of Arrangement. The announcement confirms the company is progressing with the restructuring process as per regulatory requirements. No further details on the scheme's status or timeline were disclosed.

headline: Outcome of Board Meeting
summary: Rubicon Research Limited announced the outcome of its Board Meeting held on July 20, 2026. The Board set the date for the 27th Annual General Meeting and the record date for the final dividend payment for FY 2025-26. Additionally, an update was provided on the merger of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Kia Health Tech Private Limited, with the company.

headline: Copy of Newspaper Publication
summary: Dr. Agarwal's Health Care Limited has published a newspaper notice regarding a court hearing for its proposed amalgamation scheme with Dr. Agarwal's Eye Hospital Limited. The announcement provides the formal advertisement of the petition hearing. This step advances the legal process to merge the two entities.

headline: General Updates
summary: Tech Mahindra has issued a notice to shareholders regarding a scheme of merger involving Zen3 Infosolutions Private Limited, Tech Mahindra Enterprise Services Limited, and Begig Private Limited into Tech Mahindra Limited. The announcement serves as a general update to the exchange on the proposed consolidation.

headline: General Updates
summary: Orient Cement Limited has received an order from the NCLT, Ahmedabad Bench, directing it to convene a meeting of equity shareholders on September 28, 2026, to consider and approve the proposed Scheme of Amalgamation with Ambuja Cements Limited. The meeting will be held via video conference or other audio-visual means. This update follows prior disclosures made in December 2025 and June 2026 regarding the scheme.

headline: General Updates
summary: Ambuja Cements has received an order from the NCLT, Ahmedabad Bench, directing it to convene a meeting of its equity shareholders on September 28, 2026, to consider and approve the proposed Scheme of Amalgamation with Orient Cement Limited. The meeting will be held via video conference or other audio-visual means. This update follows previous disclosures made in December 2025 and June 2026 regarding the scheme.

headline: General Updates
summary: JSW Energy has disclosed the outcome of meetings with its equity shareholders and unsecured creditors, which were held following an NCLT Mumbai Bench order dated June 2, 2026. The meetings were convened to consider and vote on a proposed scheme or resolution, as per the tribunal's directive. The company has submitted the results and proceedings of these meetings to the stock exchange.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: JSW Energy Limited has disclosed the outcome and proceedings of separate meetings of its equity shareholders and unsecured creditors, which were held as per the NCLT Mumbai Bench’s order dated June 2, 2026. The meetings were convened to consider and vote on a proposed scheme of arrangement. The company has submitted the results to the stock exchange.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Arisinfra Solutions Limited has received observation letters from BSE and NSE with no adverse objections regarding the scheme to amalgamate Arisunitern Re Solutions Private Limited with itself. This clears a key regulatory hurdle for the merger.

headline: General Updates
summary: GE Power India Limited has informed the exchange about the proceedings of a meeting of its unsecured creditors, held on July 20, 2026, as directed by the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai Bench. The meeting was convened to address matters related to the company's financial restructuring or resolution process.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: GE Power India Limited has informed the exchange that a meeting of its equity shareholders was held on July 20, 2026, as directed by the National Company Law Tribunal, Mumbai Bench. The announcement provides details on the proceedings of this meeting.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Indo Borax & Chemicals Limited has announced a Board-approved scheme to amalgamate its wholly-owned subsidiary, Indoborax Infrastructure Private Limited, with itself. The company also approved shifting its registered office to a new address in Mumbai. The amalgamation is subject to approval from the National Company Law Tribunal and other regulatory authorities.

headline: General Updates
summary: GE Power India Limited has submitted the Consolidated Scrutinizer’s Report regarding the e-voting results from the NCLT-convened meeting of Unsecured Creditors, held on July 20, 2026. The report covers both remote e-voting and in-meeting voting conducted during the session. This filing serves as a general update to the Exchange on the outcome of the creditor voting process.

headline: Press Release
summary: Anant Raj Limited's board has approved a strategic demerger to create two independent listed companies: one focused on real estate and infrastructure, and another dedicated to data centre and cloud services. The restructuring will consolidate the group's digital operations under Ashok Cloud Pvt Limited, which will be listed separately to pursue focused growth strategies. The move aims to improve operational efficiency and unlock long-term shareholder value.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Anant Raj Limited's board has approved a composite scheme of arrangement involving the merger of its wholly owned subsidiary, Anant Raj Cloud Private Limited, into itself, followed by the demerger of a defined undertaking to another wholly owned subsidiary, Ashok Cloud Private Limited. The scheme is subject to approvals from shareholders, creditors, stock exchanges, SEBI, and the National Company Law Tribunal. Both subsidiaries involved are wholly owned by Anant Raj Limited.

headline: General Updates
summary: Vintage Coffee and Beverages Limited announced that the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Hyderabad, has sanctioned the merger of its wholly-owned subsidiaries, Vintage Coffee Private Limited and Delecto Foods Private Limited, into the parent company. The order was received on July 21, 2026, and a certified copy will be submitted to stock exchanges in due course. This amalgamation consolidates the subsidiaries into the holding company under the approved scheme.

headline: General Updates
summary: Centum Electronics Limited provided an update on the court-supervised restructuring proceedings (Redressement Judiciaire) involving its French subsidiaries, Centum T&S Group S.A. and Centum T&S (Centum Technologies et Solutions). The announcement was made to inform the stock exchange of the ongoing legal process in France.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Crisil Limited's board has approved the amalgamation of its two wholly owned step-down subsidiaries, Crisil Canada Inc. and Crisil PriceMetrix Inc., into a single entity named Crisil PriceMetrix Inc. The merger aims to consolidate Crisil’s global entity structure and is subject to regulatory approvals under Ontario law. As both entities are wholly owned, the transaction does not involve related parties and will not impact Crisil’s shareholding pattern.

headline: Shareholders meeting
summary: JSW Energy Limited has submitted the voting results and scrutinizer's reports from its Equity Shareholders and Unsecured Creditors meetings, which were held as per the NCLT Mumbai Bench's order dated June 2, 2026. The meetings were convened to seek approval on a scheme or resolution, as directed by the tribunal. The filings confirm the outcome of the votes cast by both groups.

headline: Sale or disposal
summary: Based on the announcement, Eternal Limited's board approved the transfer of its 'Nugget by Zomato' business to its wholly-owned subsidiary, Carthero Technologies Private Limited, for a cash consideration of INR 35 crore as part of an internal restructuring. The board also approved the unaudited financial results for the quarter ended June 30, 2026, and the notice for the 16th Annual General Meeting. The transaction is a related party deal conducted at arm's length.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Siyaram Silk Mills Limited has received approval from the NCLT Mumbai for a Scheme of Arrangement involving the issuance of Preference Shares as a bonus to its shareholders. The scheme is between the company and its shareholders.

headline: Updates
summary: Electrotherm (India) Limited has received approval from the NCLT, Ahmedabad Bench, to issue and allot 1,09,50,000 new 6% Non-Cumulative Redeemable Preference Shares to five existing preference shareholders, with the corresponding unredeemed shares deemed redeemed. Additionally, the company must immediately redeem 10,50,000 preference shares held by the non-consenting shareholder, Ahmedabad Aviation and Aeronautics Limited, at par. This issuance does not constitute an increase or reduction of the company's share capital.
